title: Ithildin Manifest
description: Manifest consumed by the root Ithildin index page.

repositories.description: Repositories exposed by the shared index.

slug.description: Stable repository identifier used for default routing.

name.description: Display name shown in the root index.

path.description: Optional absolute or relative URL to the repository index. Defaults to ./repos/<slug>/index.html when omitted.

description.description: Optional summary shown beneath the repository name.

categories.description: Optional categories used by the root index to group repositories.

tags.description: Optional freeform tags displayed as pills on repository cards.

updatedAt.description: Optional last update timestamp for external tooling.
